commit.message:
feat: Implement Image Scan feature with configuration options

- Added interaction handlers for Image Scan settings including enabling/disabling the feature and setting kick thresholds.
- Integrated image scanning functionality that utilizes OCR to detect scam-related keywords in images.
- Enhanced security settings to include Image Scan status and kick thresholds in the command responses.
- Created advanced settings command for bot owners to configure logging channels and roles.
- Updated existing security commands to reflect new Image Scan feature and its configurations. #deploy

verification.payload:

feat: Implement Image Scan feature with configuration options

- Added interaction handlers for Image Scan settings including enabling/disabling the feature and setting kick thresholds.
- Integrated image scanning functionality that utilizes OCR to detect scam-related keywords in images.
- Enhanced security settings to include Image Scan status and kick thresholds in the command responses.
- Created advanced settings command for bot owners to configure logging channels and roles.
- Updated existing security commands to reflect new Image Scan feature and its configurations. #deploy
